seoTitle: Ascot Vale vs Ashbourne — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ascot Vale and Ashbourne. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ascot Vale vs Ashbourne: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ascot Vale and Ashbourne.
heading: Ascot Vale vs Ashbourne — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ascot Vale, Victoria and Ashbourne, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ascot Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Ashbourne (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ascot Vale or Ashbourne safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ascot Vale has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Ashbourne scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ascot Vale scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Ashbourne scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ascot Vale or Ashbourne?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ascot Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
